previous_campaign_summary: Admin reporting, i18n, customer dashboard, perf budgets, notification center, print-friendly gallery.
theme: Workshop & Course improvements, Service worker optimization, Photo comparison enhancements

phases.objective: Workshop registration flow with real-time availability check and capacity validation
Course enrollment progress tracking with completion percentage
Workshop listing page with calendar view and filtering
Service worker caching optimization with cache expiration tuning
Photo detail compare slider improvements and before/after display
Admin moderation queue enhancements with batch approve/reject
Newsletter subscription flow with email validation and confirmation
Footer and navigation polish with social links
Payment flow enhancements with error handling and retry
Admin bulk operations expansion with photo tag management
Workshop email notifications with booking confirmation
Course module completion tracking with progress persistence
Workshop registration UX improvements with form validation
Photo comparison page enhancements with keyboard navigation
Final polish and bug fixes across the site
